visual: Rises from the previous posture into a bow stance with one hand raised above the head like a fan and the other pushing forward at shoulder height.
motion_description: The figure steadily rises from a low crouched position, shifting weight back onto the left leg and twisting the torso to the right as the right arm lifts. With a continuous, fluid tempo, the right foot then steps forward into a bow stance, transferring the weight to the front leg. Simultaneously, the torso squares to the front, the right arm arcs upward to halt high above the head, and the left hand pushes outward to stop exactly at shoulder height.
